evaluator_summary: Manually implemented: msg_type_mask bitmask on Filter struct, can_match_message() fast-path, guards at all 3 get_updates call sites in grpc.rs. 56/56 tests pass.
executor_plan: Added msg_type_mask: u8 to Filter; compute at new() from sub-filter emptiness; can_match_message() does single bitwise AND; guard all get_updates call sites with continue on miss.

candidate_title: Replace tokio::broadcast with lock-free per-subscriber queue
evaluator_summary: Replaced broadcast::Sender with per-subscriber mpsc::UnboundedSender; O(1) Mutex hold to clone Arc list then lock-free CAS sends; RAII SubscriberGuard handles cleanup. 56/56 tests pass.
executor_plan: Replaced broadcast_tx with SubscriberSenders (Arc<StdMutex<Arc<Vec<SubscriberEntry>>>>); fan_out() clones Arc under mutex then sends lock-free; client_loop receives from UnboundedReceiver; SubscriberGuard removes on drop.

candidate_title: Inline encode + direct write for fast subscribers
evaluator_summary: Added FastSubSenders alongside broadcast; fast_fan_out fires before broadcast_tx.send; SubRx enum abstracts Broadcast vs dedicated Fast channel; subscribe() routes by fast_subscriber_ids config. 56/56 tests pass.
executor_plan: Added fast_sub_txs FastSubSenders to GrpcService; SubRx enum over broadcast::Receiver and mpsc::UnboundedReceiver; fast_fan_out called before broadcast in all dispatch paths; subscribe() creates dedicated channel for fast subs, RAII FastSubGuard removes on drop.

evaluator_summary: Removed message.encoded_len() and incr_bytes_sent() from both send paths in client_loop; removed unused ProstMessage import. 56/56 tests pass.
executor_plan: Remove proto_size = message.encoded_len() and metrics.incr_bytes_sent(proto_size) from 2 send sites in grpc.rs; remove unused prost::Message import.

evaluator_summary: Already implemented in codebase: FilteredUpdates is SmallVec<[FilteredUpdate; 2]> in plugin/filter/message.rs, smallvec is workspace dep. No code change needed.
